Mouse

Direct access to mouse

Mouse_Read
void Mouse_Read(
u8 port,
Mouse_State* data
)

Gets current mouse information

Parameters
port
u8

Port to check (MOUSE_PORT_1 or MOUSE_PORT_2)

data
Mouse_State*

Output mouse state

Mouse_GetOffsetX
inline i8 Mouse_GetOffsetX(
Mouse_State* data
)

Gets current mouse X offset

Parameters
data
Mouse_State*

Current mouse state (from Mouse_Read)

Return

Mouse X offset

Mouse_GetOffsetY
inline i8 Mouse_GetOffsetY(
Mouse_State* data
)

Gets current mouse Y offset

Parameters
data
Mouse_State*

Current mouse state (from Mouse_Read)

Return

Mouse Y offset

Mouse_GetAdjustedOffsetX
inline i8 Mouse_GetAdjustedOffsetX(
Mouse_State* data,
u8 spd
)

Gets current mouse X offset adjusted by speed

Parameters
data
Mouse_State*

Current mouse state (from Mouse_Read)

spd
u8

Mouse speed (MOUSE_SPEED_LOWEST, MOUSE_SPEED_LOW, MOUSE_SPEED_MEDIUM, MOUSE_SPEED_HIGH, MOUSE_SPEED_HIGHEST)

Return

Mouse X offset

Mouse_GetAdjustedOffsetY
inline i8 Mouse_GetAdjustedOffsetY(
Mouse_State* data,
u8 spd
)

Gets current mouse Y offset adjusted by speed

Parameters
data
Mouse_State*

Current mouse state (from Mouse_Read)

spd
u8

Mouse speed (MOUSE_SPEED_LOWEST, MOUSE_SPEED_LOW, MOUSE_SPEED_MEDIUM, MOUSE_SPEED_HIGH, MOUSE_SPEED_HIGHEST)

Return

Mouse Y offset

Mouse_IsButtonPress
inline bool Mouse_IsButtonPress(
Mouse_State* data,
u8 btn
)

Check if mouse button is pressed

Parameters
data
Mouse_State*

Current mouse state (from Mouse_Read)

btn
u8

Mouse button to check (MOUSE_BOUTON_LEFT, MOUSE_BOUTON_RIGHT)

Return

FALSE is not pressed

Mouse_IsButtonClick
inline bool Mouse_IsButtonClick(
Mouse_State* data,
u8 btn
)

Check if mouse button is clicked

Parameters
data
Mouse_State*

Current mouse state (from Mouse_Read)

btn
u8

Mouse button to check (MOUSE_BOUTON_LEFT, MOUSE_BOUTON_RIGHT)

Return

FALSE is not clicked
